---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for NOA
title: "feat: "
labels: feature
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Design Considerations

If this involves UI changes, note how it aligns with the NOA design system (see `DESIGN.md`):
- Grayscale palette with warm undertones
- Border radius: 12px or 9999px (pill)
- Zero shadows (ring-based elevation)
- Font weights: 400 or 500 only

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request.
